overview: A full-featured Super App for Bangladesh with Shop, Delivery, and Service categories. Features advanced commission tracking (10% auto-deduction), bKash/Nagad payment integration with admin verification, seller wallet system with withdrawal requests, analytics with 12-month charts, and a deep colorful admin dashboard.
features: Commission tracking with 10% auto-deduction from all orders
bKash & Nagad manual payment with transaction ID verification
Seller wallet system with earnings tracking and withdrawal requests
Analytics dashboard with 12-month charts and daily/weekly/monthly filters
Admin panel with Commission Dashboard, Payment Verification, and Withdrawal Management tabs
Deep colorful modern UI with gradient cards and highlight stats
Notification badges for pending payments, withdrawals, and new orders
Role-based access control with Internet Identity for admins
